mapper.select: SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, unit_price, quantity, amount, reason, date, remark FROM return_record WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, unit_price, quantity, amount, reason, date, remark FROM return_record ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, unit_price, quantity, amount, reason, date, remark FROM return_record WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} ORDER BY date DESC
SELECT id, supplier_id, book_id, unit_price, quantity, amount, reason, date, remark FROM return_record WHERE date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO return_record (supplier_id, book_id, unit_price, quantity, amount, reason, date, remark) VALUES (#{supplierId}, #{bookId}, #{unitPrice}, #{quantity}, #{amount}, #{reason}, #{date}, #{remark})
